notes: SHIP v1.14.242 — SPARKS NETWORK/DIST MODEL HEIGHTS (data-only, seven MASTER_U_TABLE rows; per handoff HANDOFF-U-TABLE-SPARKS-NET-242.md, John sign-off conditional on the §4 replay assertions — ALL PASS). Rows: sn3420=1U, sn4700=1U, sn5610=2U, cm8148=1U, ngfw-4245=1U, net-6x100g-02=1U, 12-mpo-48-lc-port-patch-panel=1U. TWO EVIDENCE CLASSES, kept distinct in the comments because they are NOT equally strong. VENDOR SPEC (5 rows — the master's pitch is CONSISTENT with these but does NOT prove them; it leaves clear U above each, so the datasheet is load-bearing): SN5610 2U per NVIDIA's own 'Spectrum-4 SN5000 2U Switch Systems' hardware user manual (64x OSFP 800GbE, 51.2Tb/s); SN4700 1U per NVIDIA SN4000-series + Dell PowerSwitch SN4700 spec sheets (32x400G QSFP-DD); SN3420 1U per NVIDIA/Lenovo product guide (48x25G + 12x100G ToR); CM8148 1U per Opengear CM8100-series datasheet (48 serial, 1.8in H); NGFW-4245 1RU per Cisco Secure Firewall 4200-series (SKU FPR4245-NGFW-K9 matches the master's slug). MASTER GEOMETRY (2 rows — no public SKU exists / port count is the class; adjacency makes any taller height IMPOSSIBLE, same evidence class as the HGX 6U ruling): net-6x100g-02 = 1U because s3:175 places s3-pkey03 at U28 and s3-pkey01 at U29 ADJACENT, so a 2U box overruns into a device the master itself put there; 12-mpo-48-lc-port-patch-panel = 1U because s3:175 stacks pp-ru06/07/08/09 at four CONSECUTIVE U (U6-U9), so a 2U panel self-collides. ⚠️ THE HANDOFF'S PHOTO-DERIVED EVIDENCE WAS CORRECTED AGAINST THE MASTER (handoff §4 explicitly ordered this — 'do not trust the photo, trust the master'): (1) THE RACK 'dh1:005' DOES NOT EXIST — SPARKS row prefixes are s1/s2/s3 only; the photographed rack is s3:175 (twin s3:176), 21 devices not 25. The U positions web-Claude read WERE correct (s3-fbs-01..04 at U11/14/17/20), so it is the right rack under the wrong name. (2) The claimed net-6x100g-02 'U25-U31 zero-gap run' is FALSE — the real positions are U28/U29/U31 (gaps of 1U and 2U). The CONCLUSION (1U) still holds via the U28/U29 adjacency, so the row ships with the TRUE proof, not the photo's. No row was shipped on evidence that did not survive the replay. REPLAY (both real masters through the shipped phantom_rackGeometry): SPARKS resolution 68.8% -> 79.3% (2850 -> 3287 of 4143), collisions 0/4143, overflow 0, bad racks 0. Each of the seven seeded ALONE onto the .241 table adds ZERO collisions (per-row isolation proof). s3:175 goes from 20 unknown to 1 (only net-ufm-05 remains gold). DFW02 UNAFFECTED — per-host height drift 0 across all 2347 placed hosts, resolution 2286/2347 and 2 collisions BOTH IDENTICAL to .241 (the 2 are the pre-existing genuine c1:002 defect), so the in-flight .238/.239/.240/.241 device pass on DFW2 REMAINS VALID; the only visible difference on a DFW2 device is the build badge reading v1.14.242.
